languages.text: "Он и титулы собирает, как и все прочее… Что ж, Лорд-капитан, давайте удлиним список его регалий. "Пепел у ног Империума", "Лишенный трофеев", "Очищенный огнем"… и "Свидетель силы Святого Трона"!" {n}Сороритас с такой силой сжимает оружие, словно удерживает свирепого пса, рвущегося к добыче.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Он и титулы собирает, как и все прочее… Что ж, Лорд-капитан, давайте удлиним список его регалий. "Пепел у ног Империума", "Лишенный трофеев", "Очищенный огнем"… и "Свидетель силы Святого Трона"!" {n}Сороритас с такой силой сжимает оружие, словно удерживает свирепого пса, рвущегося к добыче.{/n}
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: [драфт] "Он и титулы собирает, как и всё прочее… Что ж, Лорд-капитан, давайте удлиним список его регалий. "Пепел у ног Империума", "Лишённый трофеев", "Очищенный огнём"… и "Свидетель силы Святого Трона"!" {n}Сороритас с такой силой сжимает оружие, словно удерживает свирепого пса, рвущегося к добыче.{/n}

languages.text: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Он и титулы собирает, как и все прочее… Что ж, Лорд-капитан, давайте удлиним список его регалий. "Пепел у ног Империума", "Лишенный трофеев", "Очищенный огнем"… и "Свидетель силы Святого Трона"!" {n}Сороритас с такой силой сжимает оружие, словно удерживает свирепого пса, рвущегося к добыче.{/n}

'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

"He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

"He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

languages.text: “他还收集头衔等各种各样的东西……舰长大人，看来我们也该替他添几个新头衔了。‘帝国脚下的灰烬’，‘被剥夺战利品之人’，‘遭火焰净化者’……还有‘见证黄金王座神威之人’！”{n}战斗修女紧紧攥着武器，像是在拼命按住一条准备扑向猎物的恶犬。{/n}
languages.original_text: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “他还收集头衔等各种各样的东西……舰长大人，看来我们也该替他添几个新头衔了。‘帝国脚下的灰烬’，‘被剥夺战利品之人’，‘遭火焰净化者’……还有‘见证黄金王座神威之人’！”{n}战斗修女紧紧攥着武器，像是在拼命按住一条准备扑向猎物的恶犬。{/n}

languages.text: «Por lo visto, además de todas esas otras cosas, colecciona títulos... Bueno, Lord Capitán, ¿y si añadimos alguno a sus credenciales? ¡"Cenizas a los pies del Imperium", "Despojado de tesoros", "Purificado por el fuego" y "Testigo del poder del sagrado Trono"!». {n}La hermana de batalla sujeta con fuerza su arma, como si intentara evitar que un perro se abalanzara sobre su presa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Por lo visto, además de todas esas otras cosas, colecciona títulos... Bueno, Lord Capitán, ¿y si añadimos alguno a sus credenciales? ¡"Cenizas a los pies del Imperium", "Despojado de tesoros", "Purificado por el fuego" y "Testigo del poder del sagrado Trono"!». {n}La hermana de batalla sujeta con fuerza su arma, como si intentara evitar que un perro se abalanzara sobre su presa.{/n}

languages.text: « Il collectionne les titres, en plus de tout le reste... Eh bien, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, ajoutons-en un à sa liste. "Réduit en cendres aux pieds de l'Impérium", "Victime du vol de ses trophées", "Purifié par le feu" et... "Témoin de la toute-puissance du saint Trône" ! » {n}La Sœur de Bataille agrippe son arme avec force, comme si elle cherchait à empêcher un chien féroce de se jeter sur sa proie.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Il collectionne les titres, en plus de tout le reste... Eh bien, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, ajoutons-en un à sa liste. "Réduit en cendres aux pieds de l'Impérium", "Victime du vol de ses trophées", "Purifié par le feu" et... "Témoin de la toute-puissance du saint Trône" ! » {n}La Sœur de Bataille agrippe son arme avec force, comme si elle cherchait à empêcher un chien féroce de se jeter sur sa proie.{/n}

languages.text: "Diğer her şeyin yanı sıra ünvan da topluyor... Pekâlâ Lord Kaptan, onun referans listesine eklemeler yapalım. 'İmparatorluk'un Ayağının Dibindeki Kül', 'Ganimetlerinden Arındırılmış', 'Ateşle Temizlenmiş' ve 'Kutsal Taht'ın Kudretinin Tanığı'!" {n}Harp Rahibesi silahını o kadar sıkı kavrıyor ki sanki avına saldıran vahşi bir köpeği zapt ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Diğer her şeyin yanı sıra ünvan da topluyor... Pekâlâ Lord Kaptan, onun referans listesine eklemeler yapalım. 'İmparatorluk'un Ayağının Dibindeki Kül', 'Ganimetlerinden Arındırılmış', 'Ateşle Temizlenmiş' ve 'Kutsal Taht'ın Kudretinin Tanığı'!" {n}Harp Rahibesi silahını o kadar sıkı kavrıyor ki sanki avına saldıran vahşi bir köpeği zapt ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Er sammelt auch Titel, genau wie alles andere ... Nun, Lord Captain, lasst uns die Liste seiner Referenzen fortführen. 'Asche zu Füßen des Imperiums', 'Aller Trophäen beraubt', 'Gereinigt durch Feuer' ... und 'Zeuge der Macht des Heiligen Throns'!" {n}Die Schwester der Schlacht greift mit einer Entschlossenheit nach ihrer Waffe, als würde sie einen wilden Hund von seiner Beute fernhalten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "He collects titles, too, as well as everything else... Well, Lord Captain, let's add to the list of his credentials. 'Ashes at the Feet of the Imperium,' 'Stripped of Trophies,' 'Cleansed by Fire'... and 'Witness to the Power of the Holy Throne'!" {n}The Sister of Battle grips her weapon with such force, as though she were holding back a ferocious dog lunging toward prey.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Er sammelt auch Titel, genau wie alles andere ... Nun, Lord Captain, lasst uns die Liste seiner Referenzen fortführen. 'Asche zu Füßen des Imperiums', 'Aller Trophäen beraubt', 'Gereinigt durch Feuer' ... und 'Zeuge der Macht des Heiligen Throns'!" {n}Die Schwester der Schlacht greift mit einer Entschlossenheit nach ihrer Waffe, als würde sie einen wilden Hund von seiner Beute fernhalten.{/n}

languages.text: "爵位 "も集めている。さて、大尉殿、彼の資格のリストに加えましょう。インペリウムの足元の灰』、『トロフィーを剥奪』、『火によって浄化』......そして『聖なる玉座の力の証人』！"{n}戦いのシスターは、まるで獲物に向かって突進する獰猛な犬を抑え込むかのように、力強く武器を握る。{/n}
